creator: levans@ipi.us.am.ericsson.se
text:
Even using the latest 6.0.908 Citrix Metafram client, users can no longer see the files in their home directories on their local FreeBSD 4.2 nachines via the Citrix client. The Citrix clients worked fine in 3.4, have not yet tested on 4.1 to see if that is also an issue.

How-To-Repeat: Set up a FreeBSD 4.2 box, install the Citrix client, attempt to map to a local folder and view copy edt files in that folder, this should fail although the drive appears to be mapped.
